mapper.select: SELECT i.id as id, i.order_no as orderNo, i.product_id as productId, p.name as productName, i.product_unit_id as productUnitId, i.product_price as productPrice, i.count as count, i.total_price as totalPrice, i.tax_percent as taxPercent, i.tax_price as taxPrice, i.in_count as inCount, i.return_count as returnCount, p.bar_code as barCode, u.name as productUnitName, i.remark as remark FROM erp_purchase_order_items i LEFT JOIN erp_product p ON p.id = i.product_id LEFT JOIN erp_product_unit u ON u.id = p.unit_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
